get.description: Basic health check returning service status and version.

get.description: Get aggregate statistics for the dashboard.

post.description: Backup a playlist from a connector service to the local database.

get.description: Get a playlist by ID with all entries.
Get paginated track entries for a playlist.
List tracks with optional search, filters, sorting, and pagination.
Get full track details with metadata, likes, plays, and playlist memberships.
Get playlists containing a specific track.

schema.title: Response Get Track Playlists Api V1 Tracks  Track Id  Playlists Get

get.description: List all workflows with pagination and last-run status.
List all available workflow node types with config schemas.

post.description: Validate a workflow definition without persisting.
Preview an unsaved workflow definition (dry-run). Returns operation_id for SSE.
Preview a saved workflow (dry-run). Returns operation_id for SSE.

get.description: Get a workflow by ID with full definition.

patch.description: Update a user workflow's definition. Template workflows cannot be modified.

delete.description: Delete a user workflow. Template workflows cannot be deleted.

post.description: Start a workflow execution. Returns immediately with operation_id + run_id.

get.description: List execution history for a workflow.
Get a single run with node execution details.
List version history for a workflow.

schema.title: Response List Workflow Versions Api V1 Workflows  Workflow Id  Versions Get

get.description: Get a specific version with full definition.

post.description: Revert a workflow to a previous version. Creates a new version record.

get.description: Get authentication status of all configured connectors.

schema.title: Response Get Connectors Api V1 Connectors Get

post.description: Trigger a Last.fm listening history import.
Trigger a Spotify liked tracks import.
Trigger a Last.fm likes export (love tracks on Last.fm).
Import Spotify listening history from a GDPR data export JSON file.

get.description: Get sync checkpoint status for all known service/entity combinations.

schema.title: Response Get Checkpoints Api V1 Imports Checkpoints Get

get.description:
Stream real-time progress for an operation via Server-Sent Events.

Uses FastAPI's built-in EventSourceResponse encoding which provides:
- Automatic 15s keep-alive pings (prevents proxy timeouts)
- Cache-Control: no-cache and X-Accel-Buffering: no headers
- Proper SSE wire-format encoding including multi-line data handling

schema.title: Response List Active Operations Api V1 Operations Get
